violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink blocked by garbage can.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need further cleaning.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Was at +200 ppm

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove foil from cart and shelf
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Dispose cracked plastic lids.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
